error: The file must not contain emoji Unicode characters.
One or more of the required elements in the file contains only whitespace.

DocTypeIndic contains a value that indicates the file contains test data, like OECD10, OECD11, OECD12 or OECD13. Replace the test data value with a value for real data, such as OECD0, OECD1, OECD2 or OECD3.
If the MessageTypeIndic is CRS703, the file must not contain a CrsBody.
If the MessageTypeIndic value was CRS703 in a file from the same reporting period, then the MessageTypeIndic value in this file must not be CRS703.
The file must contain a CrsBody if the MessageTypeIndic is CRS701 or CRS702.
Each file must contain only one CrsBody.
SendingCompanyIN is required and must contain the FI ID for the financial institution in this report.

error.intro: MessageRefId element must be 100 characters or less. It must also match the file name and include the following in the order referenced:
mustContain: the same value as the year in the file’s ReportingPeriod in the format ‘YYYY’
the 13-character FI ID from the file’s SendingCompanyIN
one to 77 characters of your choice to make the ID unique
error.closingRule: MessageRefId must also not include less than signs (<), greater than signs (>), colons (:), straight double quotes ("), apostrophes (‘), ampersands (&), forward slashes (/), backslashes (\), vertical bars (|), question marks (?) or asterisks (*).

error: MessageRefId must not be the same as one used for a previously sent file. We only keep a record of the MessageRefId for successfully sent files.

paragraphs: File name must match the MessageRefId, excluding the .xml file extension.
If you uploaded a file with a backslash (\) in the file name, then this will shorten the file name and cause a mismatch. Remove all backslashes from the MessageRefId and file name.

You must also remove less than signs (<), greater than signs (>), colons (:), straight double quotes ("), apostrophes (‘), ampersands (&), forward slashes (/), vertical bars (|), question marks (?) and asterisks (*) from the file name.

error: MessageSpec must not contain a CorrMessageRefId.
ReportingPeriod must be in the format YYYY-MM-DD, with 12 as the month and 31 as the day.
ReportingPeriod must be 2014-12-31 or later.
ReportingPeriod cannot contain a date later than the current year.
If the ReportingFI DocTypeIndic is OECD0, OECD2 or OECD3, the ReportingPeriod must match the previously sent file.
ReportingFI must contain one ResCountryCode element. The value must be ‘GB’.
If an AccountReport contains ‘US’ for all Individual ResCountryCode values, the account should be reported under FATCA.

error.intro: The account should be reported under FATCA if both of the following apply:
bullets: the AcctHolderType is CRS102 or CRS103
an AccountReport contains 'US' for all Organisation ResCountryCode values

error: ReportingFI and Organisation elements must contain an IN element. For organisations without an IN, use ‘NOTIN’ for the IN value.
An IN must have an issuedBy attribute, unless the IN value is ‘NOTIN’.
Individual nameType attribute cannot be OECD201.
Address element must contain AddressFix.
ReportingFI has a DocTypeIndic of OECD3 for deletion. You can only delete the ReportingFI if you also delete all of the AccountReport sections for this reporting period.

bullets: the ReportingFI DocTypeIndic must be OECD0 or OECD1
all AccountReport DocTypeIndic values must be OECD1
the ReportingFI DocTypeIndic must be OECD0, OECD2 or OECD3
the AccountReport DocTypeIndic values must be OECD2, OECD3 or a combination of these values

error: OECD0 for resending information can only be used in the ReportingFI section.
DocRefId values must be unique across all submitted files, except in the ReportingFI section where the DocTypeIndic is OECD0. We only keep a record of these IDs for successfully sent files.

intro: If OECD0 is in the ReportingFI section, the DocRefId value must contain the DocRefId of the section you want to resend.
Otherwise, the DocRefId element must be 164 characters or less and include the following in the order referenced:
bullets: the same value as the MessageRefId, up to 100 characters
one to 63 characters of your choice to make the ID unique

error: ReportingFI contains a DocTypeIndic of OECD0 to resend information sent in a previous file, but the DocRefId is not one from a previous file's ReportingFI section.
ReportingFI contains a DocTypeIndic of OECD0 to resend information sent in a previous file but the DocRefId provided has already been corrected or deleted.
DocSpec element must not contain a CorrMessageRefId element.
The CorrDocRefId provided does not match any DocRefId in our records for the same type of section.
CorrDocRefId must not be included in a DocSpec where the DocTypeIndic is OECD1 for new information.
DocTypeIndic is OECD2 or OECD3 for a correction or deletion so you must provide a CorrDocRefId.
The same CorrDocRefId cannot be used more than once in each file.
The CorrDocRefId provided is for information that has already been corrected or deleted.
When correcting or deleting the AccountReport, the CorrDocRefId must contain a DocRefId reported under the same ReportingFI and ReportingPeriod.
If the ReportingFI DocTypeIndic is OECD0, the DocSpec should not contain a CorrDocRefId.
CrsBody element must contain only one ReportingGroup section.
ReportingGroup section must not contain the Sponsor section.
ReportingGroup section must not contain the Intermediary section.
If the ReportingFI DocTypeIndic is OECD0 or OECD1, the file must have an AccountReport section.
If the ClosedAccount attribute is 'true', the AccountBalance value must be ‘0’.

error.intro: If the AcctNumberType is OECD601, the AccountNumber for the IBAN must include the following in the order referenced:
If the AcctNumberType is OECD603, the AccountNumber for the ISIN must include the following in the order referenced:
bullets: 9 letters or numbers for the national security identifier

error: If the AccountNumber AcctNumberType attribute is OECD606, the AccountType value must be CRS1101.
If the AccountNumber AcctNumberType attribute is OECD601, the AccountType value must be CRS1101.
If the AccountType value is CRS1103, the AccountNumber AcctNumberType attribute must be OECD605.
If EquityInterestType is provided, the AccountType value must be CRS1104.
If ReportingPeriod is later than 2025-12-31, the AccountHolder SelfCert value must not be CRS900.
Each Individual element must contain a TIN element. For individuals without a TIN, use 'NOTIN' for the TIN value.
A TIN must have an issuedBy attribute, unless the TIN value is ‘NOTIN’.
Individual must not contain a Nationality element.
BirthDate must be 1900-01-01 or later and not later than the current date.
AccountHolder Organisation ResCountryCode element is required where the Organisation AcctHolderType is CRS102 or CRS103.

error.intro: AccountReport must not contain a ControllingPerson element if both of the following apply:
bullets: AccountReport contains an AccountHolder Organisation element
AcctHolderType value is CRS102 or CRS103

error.intro: AccountReport must contain a ControllingPerson element if both of the following apply:
bullets: AccountReport contains an AccountHolder Organisation element

error: If the AccountHolder is an Individual, the AccountReport must not contain a ControllingPerson.
If the ReportingPeriod is later than 2025-12-31, the CtrlgPersonType must not be CRS800.
If the ReportingPeriod is later than 2025-12-31, the ControllingPerson SelfCert must not be CRS1000.
AccountBalance value must be 0 or more.
If the AccountType is CRS1101, the Payment Type value must be CRS502 for interest.
If the AccountType is CRS1104, the Payment Type value must be either CRS503 or CRS504.
If the AccountType is CRS1103, the Payment Type value must be either CRS503 or CRS504.
If the ReportingPeriod is later than 2025-12-31, the DDProcedure must not be CRS1200 for not reported.
If the ReportingPeriod is later than 2025-12-31, the AccountType must not be CRS1100 for not reported.
The file must not contain a PoolReport section.
